scope_summary: WA's principal statute for the subdivision of land by strata titles schemes (built-strata and survey-strata) and for the governance of those schemes. Part 3 interfaces directly with the planning system: subdivision approval of strata and survey-strata schemes by the WA Planning Commission, application of the Planning and Development Act 2005, local government approvals and preliminary determinations, and review rights. The Act also regulates scheme documents (scheme plans, schedules of unit entitlements, by-laws), registration and land titles, statutory easements, strata companies and managers, buyer protection, and dispute resolution via the State Administrative Tribunal. Applies state-wide in Western Australia.
